choices.text: L1 throughput limit (~7 TPS) + fees ($0.50-50+). Settles tx off-chain via payment channels; only on-chain when opening/closing. Result: near-instant, sub-cent fees, millions of TPS theoretically.

questions.explanation: Off-chain settlement scales throughput + cuts fees.

choices.text: Custodial wallets (Wallet of Satoshi, Cash App) = 1-click but trust provider. Non-custodial (Phoenix, Breez, Zeus, LND/CLN node) = run node, true Bitcoin ethos. Tradeoff: convenience vs. sovereignty.
